summary: Critical gaps: test files (parsers.test.ts, aggregator.test.ts, markdown.test.ts) referenced in workflow are entirely missing — violates TDD requirement and makes workflow unmoldable. Fixture files (fixtures/*.xml, fixtures/*.json) not provided. No act test harness, no act-result.txt artifact, no actionlint validation shown. Actions not SHA-pinned (e.g., actions/checkout@v4 should be full 40-char SHA per security policy). Code quality is decent (types sound, parsers functional, error handling present) but delivery is incomplete against stated requirements.
